intent: Build a validation prototype of differ — a systems-level code review tool that renders topology-first interactive HTML reviews

decision_trace.decision: Self-contained HTML output with inline force-directed graph simulation
decision_trace.rationale: Zero external dependencies means the review.html works offline, loads instantly, and can be shared as a single file

decision_trace.decision: Rounded rectangles instead of circles for nodes
decision_trace.rationale: Full node labels are essential for readability — the topology diagram must be glanceable without interaction

decision_trace.decision: Agent self-reports the delta rather than inferring from static analysis
decision_trace.rationale: Dramatically simpler to build, validates the core UX hypothesis without investing in analysis infrastructure

decision_trace.decision: Topology file is checked into the repo and agent-maintained
alternatives: Infer topology from accumulated delta history
No baseline — agent declares full topology each time
decision_trace.rationale: Simple source of truth with no cold-start problem; stays fresh because agents update it as part of their workflow
